name: Creole White Bean Soup
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook onion, celery, and bell pepper in butter until soft.
2. Add ham and tomato sauce; simmer 15 to 20 minutes.
3. Bring navy beans with bacon to boil in a separate saucepan.
4. Puree the beans and their liquid in a food processor or blender.
5. Add the puree to the ham mixture.
6. Add water; season to taste.
7. Simmer for 1 hour.
8. Serve piping hot.
